_provenance: Promoted 2026-05-17 from godot/data/_drafts/ch1_asia_2026-05-17.json (Ch1 sweep). Hint states (renamed from hint_states[] to states[] per _schema.md). won_court unified.

states._comment: Hint state 1 — met_asia set but Pig's crisis not yet surfaced. Point toward Mr. Pig. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: You should talk to Mr. Pig first. He's the loudest crisis in the room.

states._comment: Hint state 2 — Pig crisis revealed; Murrow not yet met. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: Mr. Murrow will know what the case is actually about. He's somewhere between the files and disappointment.

states._comment: Hint state 3 — Murrow met; binder not yet collected. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: You're looking for the procedural binder? I tried lifting it once and briefly saw another dimension.

states._comment: Hint state v3 NEW — binder collected but envelope page not yet read with Crab. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: Mr. Murrow left the binder open on your desk this morning, Dr. A. Cula. Page one is the envelope.

states._comment: Hint state v3 NEW — envelope page read, renewal page not yet read. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: The next tab, Dr. A. Cula. Mr. Murrow flagged it in three colours.

states._comment: Hint state 4 — binder collected; Crab not yet recruited. Bare 'Crab' per bible + asia_hint_states_ch1.md §address-forms (Crab, Whimsy bare). v3 asymmetry corrected 2026-05-19 per critique F2.
lines: If it's a service problem, Crab will have an opinion. He always has an opinion.

states._comment: Hint state 5 — Crab recruited; Rights Memo not yet collected. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3. Single sanctioned em-dash is pre-existing in v3.
lines: The rights memo may be near Whimsy. Try Café Paragraf — or wherever someone is talking too loudly about fairness.

states._comment: Hint state 6 — Rights Memo collected; Whimsy not yet recruited. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: Whimsy is useful if pointed at the right page. Ask him what's in the memo.

states._comment: NEW hint state — pre-Beat-8 per chapter_1.md §Asia hint-state logic L385: 'Before Beat 8 (after Whimsy recruited, before client meeting): hint Asia toward the client's imminent arrival.' Register: warm_direct. Two jokes (Rule C): 'due in shortly' casual professional tone + 'the one that looks intentional' dry observation about the meeting room vs. the rest of the office. Fires from the hint-desk interaction; fires before halina_arrived_announcement so Asia has a line on any desk revisit during this window.
lines: Mrs. Sikorska is due in shortly. I've set out the meeting room. The meeting room is the one that looks intentional.

states._comment: Beat 8 bridging hint — fires from hint-desk when Cula returns after Whimsy recruitment. on_dismiss sets halina_arrived=true, flipping Halina's NPC presence gate for the meeting room. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: Mrs. Sikorska is here. I've shown her into the meeting room.

states._comment: Hint state 7 — Whimsy recruited, Halina arrived; point toward Mrs. Sikorska in the meeting room. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: Mrs. Sikorska is in the meeting room. She brought her own folder.

states._comment: Hint state v3 NEW — cold acknowledgement of incapacity blunder. once:true. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: Mr. Murrow asked me to hold his calls, Dr. A. Cula. He didn't say for how long.

states._comment: Hint state v3 NEW — sympathetic-stance bonus evidence. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: Mrs. Wojcik rang earlier. She wanted to know whether Friday at fourteen hundred was the time, Dr. A. Cula. I said yes.

states._comment: Hint state v3 NEW — blunt-procedural-stance bonus evidence. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: The return-to-sender stamps look right, Dr. A. Cula. Poczta Polska prints the same ink they did in two thousand and ten.

states._comment: Hint state v3 NEW — technical-stance bonus evidence. Transit-warmth idiom. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: Mrs. Sikorska's father worked on the railways, Dr. A. Cula. My grandfather did too. They both had flats from the housing stock.

states._comment: Hint state v3 NEW — landlord-intimidation reveal. Asia observes affect from the front desk. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: Mrs. Sikorska looked tired today, Dr. A. Cula. Not Friday-fourteen-hundred-tired. Older.

states._comment: NEW hint state — pre-Beat-9 per chapter_1.md §Asia hint-state logic L387: 'Before Beat 9 (after client meeting, before archive room): hint Asia toward Murrow at the Archive Room.' Register: warm_direct. Two jokes (Rule C): 'focused face / disappointed face / exactly one eyebrow' domestic-admin character reading + the line itself is a hint delivered as an observation about Murrow's affect rather than a direction. Cheerful-while-drowning register: she noticed; she is reporting it while doing something else.
lines: Mr. Murrow took the binder to the archive after the meeting. He was making his focused face, which is different from his disappointed face by exactly one eyebrow.

states._comment: Hint state 8 — Beat 8 client meeting concluded; Murrow in archive for Beat 9. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: Mr. Murrow is in the archive with the binder. He's been making the disappointed-page-turn sound.

states._comment: Hint state 9 — archive research complete; readiness check not yet done. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: Mr. Murrow should check the case before court. He has a special face for missing documents.

states._comment: Coffee V1.4 S-grade. Post-readiness, pre-court window. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: You made the café machine sound less haunted. That's new.

states._comment: Coffee V1.4 A/B-grade. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: You look prepared. Or at least caffeinated in a legally promising way.

states._comment: Coffee V1.4 D/F-grade. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: You are vibrating near the case board. I'll mark that as readiness-adjacent.

states._comment: Coffee V1.4 skipped. Gate narrowed to post-readiness, pre-court window per asia_hint_states_ch1.md note. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: No coffee? Brave. Not wise, necessarily, but brave.

states._comment: Hint state 10 — readiness check passed; court not yet resolved. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: If Mr. Murrow says you're ready, go north to the District Court. And maybe drink water.

states._comment: Hint state 11 — court won; Beat-14 Swine postcard not yet arrived. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: Something arrived from Mr. Swine. The stamp looks expensive and irresponsible.

states._comment: Hint state 12 (default) — all chapter-1 flags satisfied; chapter-close register. Verbatim from asia_hint_states_ch1.json v3.
lines: For the first time today, nothing is actively on fire. I give it twelve minutes.
